chapter_title.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ وَ الْخُطْبَةِ فِيهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 88 – Salāt of the two Eids and the sermon in these two

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/431)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/431)
text: لَا صَلَاةَ يَوْمَ الْفِطْرِ وَ الْأَضْحَى إِلَّا مَعَ إِمَامٍ .

en.hubeali: Al-Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al-Washa, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Ma’mar Bin Yahya,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘There is no Salāt on the day of (Eid) Al-Fitr and (Eid) Al-Az’ha, except with a prayer leader’.
en.sarwar: 2. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ from Hammad ibn ‘Uthaman from Ma‘mar ibn Yahya who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘There is not any Salah (prayer) on the day of al-Fitr or al- Adha’ except with Imam.”’
